personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Python, SQL, ETL/ELT & Cloud Data Platforms
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise engineering experience delivering robust Python/SQL data pipelines, cloud data platforms, and analytics-ready datasets. Strong in ETL/ELT architecture, workflow reliability, data quality controls, and performance tuning across large-scale environments. Hands-on with Spark-based processing, orchestration patterns, and governance-aware delivery in regulated contexts. Effective cross-functional partner for analytics, product, and engineering stakeholders.

skills.name: AWS Data Platform (S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena)

bullets: Designed and maintained production SQL/Python ETL/ELT pipelines for high-volume telemetry and operational datasets.
Built scalable cloud data workflows and optimized query/storage patterns for analytics performance and reliability.
Implemented automated validation, monitoring, and fault-handling to improve data trust and reduce pipeline incidents.
Collaborated with architecture, analytics, and business stakeholders to deliver documented, maintainable data flows.
Applied Spark/PySpark processing patterns for large-scale data transformation and enrichment workloads.
Integrated CI/CD-friendly engineering practices and version-controlled changes for repeatable pipeline delivery.
experience.title: Senior Data Engineer

bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for Brand.com, ensuring robust observability and data pipeline monitoring for critical customer-facing systems.

Upgraded Dynatrace (6.5 to 7.0), implemented TLS 1.2 security, and supported AWS cloud migration.
Built end-to-end monitoring dashboards delivering before/after performance metrics for stakeholder reporting.
experience.title: Performance Engineer

bullets: Led large-scale CA APM implementations and upgrades (9.1 to 10.1), managing 4,000–6,000 monitoring agents for enterprise financial clients.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, and alerts; developed Perl/Ksh extraction scripts for data collection and enrichment pipelines.
Provided sizing recommendations and bottleneck resolution for J2EE/.NET enterprise environments.
Trained client technical teams on APM solutions, ensuring adoption and operational effectiveness.
experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)

bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications to identify load and break points; documented JDBC, thread, memory, CPU, and GC metrics.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for enhanced pipeline monitoring; created automation scripts to streamline testing workflows.
experience.title: Performance Test Engineer

bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine; reduced hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion validation and ensure data integrity across the migration.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing for 10x throughput improvement at VISA-scale load.
experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer

bullets: Conducted UML design and module development for a CICS/MQSeries/XML/DB2 messaging system for IRS modernization.
Developed high-reliability messaging architecture using VC++ and DB2.
experience.title: Architect / Developer — IRS CADE Project

bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ interfaces using POSIX sockets and Marconi APIs for telecom billing platforms.
Enhanced billing performance with C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL, achieving 75% memory reduction and 20% throughput gain.
Automated system administration for WebLogic/WebSphere using Korn Shell scripts.
experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic pipeline in Python orchestrating 10+ automated steps: API integrations, semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered scoring, resume/cover letter generation, quality gating, and application tracking. Implements RAG-style retrieval with sentence-transformers and event-driven step orchestration.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small-file problem using Snappy + Parquet columnar compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting with a parallel generator-based Python/PySpark pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights.
